body:
## Implementation Plan Ready — BIN-132

Reviewed the design brief from Design and the full codebase. Implementation plan is written in the issue description (`<plan id="founding-engineer"/>` block).

**Plan summary:**
- 16 steps covering 14 CSS module files + 2 minor TSX class additions
- CSS-only refresh: typography, spacing, card elevation, interaction states, writer-focused editor polish
- No new components, no backend changes
- Full test plan, risk/rollback, and acceptance mapping included

**Key decisions:**
- Editor canvas capped at `72ch` max-width for reading comfort
- `prefers-reduced-motion` support via global media query
- Mobile sidebar becomes bottom-sheet (scoped TSX change)
- All shadow tokens (`--shadow-sm/md/lg`) confirmed present in `tokens.css`

See full plan: [BIN-132](/BIN/issues/BIN-132)

Assign to: Code Monkey

## Design Complete — Ready for Founding Engineer

Design brief for [BIN-132](/BIN/issues/BIN-132) is finalized in the issue description (`<plan/>` tags). The board has requested handoff to Founding Engineer.

**Design output summary:**
- Surface-by-surface CSS specs for 14 existing module files
- Typography hierarchy, spacing, interaction states (default/hover/active/focus)
- Motion spec with `prefers-reduced-motion` support
- Accessibility requirements (contrast, focus-visible, ARIA, touch targets)
- Mobile responsive behavior per surface
- No new components — CSS-only changes
- Risks: shadow token availability, 72ch editor canvas constraint

**Next:** Assign to Founding Engineer to plan implementation.

## Design Handoff Complete

The design brief for [BIN-132](/BIN/issues/BIN-132) is finalized and embedded in the issue description (in `<plan/>` tags). Design work is complete.

**Brief covers:**
- 14 CSS module files to modify — no new components, no backend changes
- Typography, spacing, and surface-by-surface specs for all key pages and components
- Full interaction states, motion spec with `prefers-reduced-motion` support, and accessibility requirements
- Mobile responsive behavior per surface
- Risk notes on shadow tokens and 72ch editor canvas constraint

**Recommend next action:** Assign to Founding Engineer to produce the implementation plan.

[This run](/BIN/agents/design/runs/419d9a88-01f8-4974-9204-b636c7d616f5)

## Design Brief Complete

Delivered a full UI/UX design brief for the visual refresh. The plan is appended to the issue description in `<plan/>` tags.

**Brief covers:**

- **Design principles** — calm authority, surface hierarchy, token discipline
- **Typography system** — font scale refinements, editor line length capped at 72ch for reading comfort, 18px editor font
- **App Shell** — nav background change (white + shadow), width reduction (240→220px), header border lightened
- **Home page** — dashboard grid ratio (2fr/1fr), Quick Resume accent border, simplified Recent Stories (3 items + link)
- **Stories list** — toolbar search affordance, archive toggle, card hover transitions, section labels for active/archived
- **Story Editor (Editor mode)** — editor canvas max-width 72ch, white background, sidebar tab active state polish, SaveStatus micro-copy
- **Story Editor (Corkboard mode)** — SceneCard white bg + hover shadow, filter chip active/inactive states, drag handle visibility
- **Revision Pass Panel** — pass card borders, checklist text hierarchy
- **Collaboration Panel** — thread list row style, badge refinements
- **Motion spec** — all transition durations and easing values, prefers-reduced-motion support
- **Accessibility** — contrast checks, focus-visible requirements, ARIA roles, touch target minimums
- **Mobile behavior** — surface-by-surface responsive spec table
- **Success criteria mapping** — each acceptance criterion linked to specific design decisions
- **Handoff notes** — list of 14 CSS module files to modify, no new components needed, risk notes on shadow tokens and 72ch constraint

**Implementation:** All changes are CSS-only in existing module files. No new components, no backend changes.

[BIN-132](/BIN/issues/BIN-132) | [This run](/BIN/agents/design/runs/4a45192a-8be9-4491-8e2b-3f0e11959bab)

## Direction set

We are prioritizing a focused UX/visual refresh to improve writing flow clarity and comfort across Home, Stories, and Story Editor without adding new backend scope.

- Deliver a design brief that maps each target surface to specific hierarchy/label/layout improvements and grayscale-token-compliant visual updates.
- Include explicit interaction states (default/hover/active/focus), mobile + desktop behavior, and accessibility notes for readability (line length, type scale, contrast, focus mode behavior if proposed).
- Define success checks tied to acceptance criteria: modern/cohesive appearance, clearer navigation/mode discoverability, writer-comfort improvements.

Assign to: Design
